Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi X70 Bus Timetable Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Mirfa Bus Station

July 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Public transportation system in city of Abu Dhabi vividly promotes reliability and accessibility to its residents as well as visitors. One of its main routes is Bus X70 which operates from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Mirfa Bus Station, with stop at Tarif Bus Station. The route, travel times, major stops and travel tips of Bus X70 are explained in detail in this guide.

Contents

Operational Details

On schedule all the time, Bus X70 is very convenient for passengers to plan trips. Below is the complete timetable for departures from both Abu Dhabi and Mirfa:

From Abu Dhabi Bus Station From Mirfa Bus Station
07:00 10:00
10:00 13:00
13:00 16:00
16:00 19:00

Bus X70 TimetableYou can visit the official AD Mobility website for complete and updated timings or you can check this link X70 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Fares begin from AED 2 for single zone travel and can be paid through Hafilat Card. There are additional charges for longer journeys. Recharging the Hafilat Cards is also quite easy at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Bus X70 passes through several key stops, connecting passengers to important destinations across Abu Dhabi:

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station: The starting point of the journey.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Tarif Bus Station: A mid-point offering access to nearby areas.

  2. Mirfa Bus Station: The final destination, close to the serene Mirfa Beach.

Other bus routes in Abu Dhabi that you can check out are the X88 bus route which passes through stations from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to ADNOC Bus Station.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Along the route, passengers can explore the following attractions:

1.

2.

Journey Experience

Bus X70 from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Mirfa Bus Station is a long journey but a scenic one which shows you a bit of Abu Dhabi’s varied landscapes. The route takes us through Tarif, passing from the hustle and bustle of Abu Dhabi to the peaceful coastal vibes of Mirfa.

Tarif is a noted midway point, close to desert dunes and a place of quiet charm. Travelers arriving in Mirfa are treated to beautiful views of the Arabian Gulf and the town’s annual al Dhafra Water Festival brings a splash of cultural richness.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
